_meta.description: Schema for a conflict record in the Oil Painting Research Assistant. A conflict record logs a known disagreement between two or more sources or chunks on a factual, historical, or scope-related claim. Conflict records drive disclosure behavior in answer generation.

conflict_id.description: Unique conflict record ID. Assigned when the conflict is first logged.

entity_type.description: Whether the conflict is between source records, chunk records, or a mix.

entity_ids.description: IDs of the sources or chunks in conflict. May be source_ids, chunk_ids, or a mix.

topic.description: Short label for the topic or claim in conflict. Used for indexing and search.

summary.description: Description of the conflict: what each source claims, and why they disagree.

requires_answer_disclosure.description: Whether answers to questions touching this conflict must explicitly disclose the conflict to the user.

resolution_status.description: Current resolution state of the conflict.

preferred_value_or_source.description: If the conflict is resolved with a preferred source or value, identify it here. Null if unresolved or if both are disclosed.

resolution_reason.description: Explanation of how and why the resolution was reached. Required when resolution_status is resolved_with_preferred.

reviewer.description: Username or identifier of the reviewer who resolved or assessed the conflict. Null if unreviewed.

reviewed_at.description: Timestamp when the conflict was last reviewed. Null if unreviewed.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the conflict record was first created.

notes.description: Optional additional context about the conflict or resolution process.
